risk_if_not_implemented: Without Elastic Expansion, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Alternate Processing Site
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to establish an alternate processing site that provides security measures equivalent to that of the primary site.
compensating_control_1.justification: Alternate Processing Site (BCD-09) provides resilience and recovery capability that compensates for the absence of Elastic Expansion (CAP-05) by ensuring the organization can restore operations and data when the primary control is absent. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Capacity Planning
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct capacity planning so that necessary capacity for information processing, telecommunications and environmental support will exist during contingency operations.
compensating_control_2.justification: Capacity Planning (CAP-03) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Elastic Expansion (CAP-05) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
